title: ts@ba' #6634
definition:
1) to desire, be inclined, be willing, be pleased
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to desire
        1a2) to be pleased
        1a3) to will (without hindrance) (of God)
nasbUsage:

    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to desire
        1a2) to be pleased
        1a3) to will (without hindrance) (of God)

    NASB:  to be inclined, desire, be pleased
